tasks.name: **Task Name**: Implement SM4-GCM encryption/decryption for PDF/A-3 documents using Alibaba Cloud KMS
tasks.description: Build a reusable utility that encrypts/decrypts PDF/A-3 files using SM4-GCM (128-bit key) via Alibaba Cloud KMS API. Must validate PDF/A-3 conformance *before* encryption and preserve embedded metadata (XMP, digital signatures).
tasks.inputs_outputs: `{ encryptedBlob: Buffer, kmsEncryptedKey: string, metadata: { keyId, algorithm, pdfA3Valid: true } }`

tasks.name: **Task Name**: Build consent state machine with opt-in/opt-out/withdrawal tracking and audit logging
tasks.description: Implement a consent service that enforces PIPL Art. 28–30: granular purpose-based consent, explicit opt-in (no pre-ticked), withdrawal = immediate revocation, immutable audit trail. Supports natural/juridical persons.

tasks.name: **Task Name**: Design and implement schema + REST API for unified natural/juridical customer profiles
tasks.description: Create a canonical customer model supporting both individual (natural) and corporate (juridical) entities in one schema. Includes mandatory fields per CBIRC §3.5 (UBO disclosure) and PIPL (data minimization).
tasks.inputs_outputs: Full customer object (with masked PII in responses unless authz scope `pii:read`)
tasks.priority: **p0** (core domain model; prerequisite for all downstream modules)

tasks.name: **Task Name**: Implement lightweight UBO resolution service calling Refinitiv World-Check API
tasks.description: Build a synchronous service that submits juridical customer data to Refinitiv World-Check API for PEP/Sanctions screening and returns resolved UBOs. Includes fallback handling and CBIRC §3.5-compliant result mapping.
tasks.inputs_outputs: `CUSTOMER-UNIFIED-VIEW` (to supply input data), ACK Redis cluster setup (assumed infra)
tasks.priority: **p1** (critical for cbirc §3.5; requires external api credentials)

tasks.name: **Task Name**: Build secure document upload/retrieval API for SM4-encrypted PDF/A-3 files
tasks.description: Implement REST endpoints to store/retrieve customer documents (e.g., ID scans, incorporation docs) with end-to-end SM4 encryption, access control, and PIPL-compliant retention.
tasks.priority: **p1** (directly enables customer master’s document vault requirement)

tasks.name: **Task Name**: Author Helm charts and K8s manifests for deploying core services on Alibaba ACK
tasks.description: Package all above services (`consent`, `customer`, `vault`, `ubo`) as Helm charts
